steps: The ratio of flour to sugar is 3:1, meaning for every 3 parts flour, 1 part sugar is used. If Sam uses 9 tablespoons of flour, we set up the proportion: 3/1 = 9/x, where x is the tablespoons of sugar. Cross-multiplying gives 3x = 9, so x = 9/3 = 3. Therefore, 3 tablespoons of sugar are needed.
